title: sophora fulvida
intro: Sophora fulvida, also known as Kowhai, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand and Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to inhibit the growth of bacteria and its anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Sophora fulvida include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce inflammation in the body. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
